Result.Name: Expired Permit Hold
Result.HoldReason: This hold locks down a permit that has expired so no further work can be conducted until this hold is lifted.  This hold is added via Permit Expired IO when the status is changed manually to Expired.
Result.Comments: 30-day letter sent to property owner. Permit expired for no activity per N.C. General Statue "§ 160D-1111. No work authorized by any building permit that has expired shall be performed until a new permit has been secured
